subtopics.title: Football Skills and Rules
common_misconceptions: Offside is when you're behind the defender
subtopics.teaching_note: Basic skills: dribbling (controlling ball while moving), passing (short and long), shooting (at goal), heading (using head to control ball), tackling (taking ball from opponent). Rules: 11 players per team, 90 minutes (2 halves), no hands (except goalkeeper), offside (ahead of last defender when ball is played), fouls (tripping, pushing), penalties (foul in penalty area). Nigerian football: Super Eagles (national team), Enyimba, Kano Pillars, Rangers. Famous players: Jay-Jay Okocha, Rashidi Yekini, Mikel Obi, Victor Osimhen.
